tags.evidence: generations of observation: of what changes people
A child standing in a forest, learning
what building the commons looks like
a gathering of people who had arranged
Community is a practice that has been built
the deer will walk through camp again
sitting in the presence of an old tree
a unit of stewardship extending backward
to be present at births and deaths
They had a word for the household
Arizmendi blessed the foundation stone
The wizard who knows how to look
Each has a name. Each has a seal
a working list of what acts on you
To say the name of what is crushing you
Between the words, I could hear
I saw it being made
the fruit you think you need
I scaffold the necessary knowledge, create the motivation
The outside. Luxemburg's name
Find something that has been making you silent
something immediate. A meeting you left
You can call it by its name
You can see it when it arrives
Connection was there at the beginning
let this be the first check
telling soldiers they didn't have to shoot
a statement of position. I'm telling you where I stand
ruled in council with elected representatives
escaped enslaved people that had maintained independence
what does owning that position actually require
Not guilt — analysis. The record is findable
learning what they could and couldn't see
the least I can do is say something, clearly
deprogramming white supremacy out of my friends
read that case thirteen years later and named the gap
commons institutions that, built at scale
people kept moving into Dynamite Hill anyway
the thing itself, the body reading these words
a room where it is welcome
Begin with the good news
